_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every generated audio asset. Consumed by the Python generator (scripts/sunoapi/) AND the Node codegen (scripts/audio/gen-bindings.js → client/src/audio.generated.ts). Never hand-edit audio.generated.ts; edit here and run `npm run audio`. `descriptor` is the UNIQUE per-asset prompt fragment combined with theme.json palettes — not the whole prompt. `output` is repo-relative; the client loads it at './'+(output without leading 'assets/'). `placeholder` (sfx) names an existing synth WAV in assets/sfx/ to fall back to until the .mp3 is generated. `priority`: 'must' = first generation batch (--only must), 'nice' = later. See docs/AUDIO_PIPELINE.md.

music.title: Caves of Steel
music.descriptor: slow haunting title theme, a fragile music-box melody over a cold steel-city drone, the calm dread before the escape

music.title: Quiet Corridors
music.descriptor: seamless low-energy exploration loop, sparse pulses and distant machinery, watchful and patient, never resolving

music.title: Something Noticed
music.descriptor: rising tension loop, pulsing sub bass and ticking detuned bells, a robot is paying attention, dread building

music.title: Hunted
music.descriptor: high-threat panic loop, driving sub-bass heartbeat and shrieking metallic textures, being actively hunted, claustrophobic

music.title: Sealed
music.descriptor: oppressive lockdown loop, a low droning klaxon-like swell under grinding steel, the room has sealed, inescapable dread

music.title: Out
music.descriptor: short bittersweet victory sting, a fragile ascending music-box phrase breaking into cold open air, relief tinged with unease

music.title: Caught
music.descriptor: short grim defeat sting, a sudden detuned downward swell and a cold mechanical snap, the moment of capture

music.title: Steel Hum
music.descriptor: barely-there ambient under-bed, a near-silent steel hum and faraway drips, pure atmosphere, almost subliminal

sfx.descriptor: a robot's single rising alert chirp, cold synthetic detection tone, it has noticed something
a relentless looping robotic pursuit motif, fast mechanical servo footsteps and a low aggressive hum, closing in
a single heavy robotic footstep on steel floor, servo whine then a metallic clank
a tense escalating warning pulse, the panic meter is filling, two quick anxious electronic beeps rising in pitch
a harsh looping facility lockdown klaxon, cold industrial alarm blaring through steel corridors
a descending all-clear chime, the lockdown lifts, three cool synthetic tones settling, cautious relief
a heavy steel blast door slamming and bolting shut, deep mechanical thud and a final ominous latch clank
a heavy gate unsealing and grinding open, hydraulic hiss and rolling steel, the way out reveals itself
a short cool notification chime, one objective step done, a single clean synthetic tick
a satisfying quest-complete flourish, a short rising arpeggio of cold synth bells, objective met
a denied buzzer, you cannot escape yet, a flat dissonant electronic refusal
a quick light pickup blip, a soft synthetic chirp, something collected
a warm positive confirmation, an animal now follows you, two friendly rounded tones
a sad fading descending tone, a follower has been lost, the herd shrinks
a seamless ambient facility bed, low steel hum, distant servo whines and faint electrical crackle, unsettling room tone
a sharp cold capture impact, a robotic clamp seizing, metallic snap with a low thud
a harsh negative error buzz, a cold dissonant electronic rejection
a clean positive confirmation, two cool rising synthetic tones, action accepted
